segments.text: The Lord told Moses,
Order the Israelites to expel from the camp anyone who has a skin disease, or who has a discharge, or who is unclean from touching a dead body.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Whether male or female, you must expel them so they won't make their camp unclean, for that is where I live with them.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: The Israelites followed these instructions, and expelled such people from the camp. They did what the Lord had told Moses they should do.
The Lord told Moses,
Tell the Israelites that when a man or woman is unfaithful to the Lord by sinning against someone else, they are guilty
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: and must confess their sin. They have to pay the full amount of compensation plus one-fifth of its value, and give this to the person they have wronged.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: However, if that person doesn't have a relative who can be paid the compensation, it belongs to the Lord and shall be given to the priest, together with a sacrificial ram by which the guilty person is set right.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: All holy offerings that the Israelites bring to the priest belong to him.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Your holy offerings belong to you, but once you give them to the priest they belong to him.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: The Lord told Moses,
Tell the Israelites that these are the instructions to follow if a man's wife has an affair, being unfaithful to him
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: by sleeping with someone else. It may be that her husband doesn't find out and her unclean act wasn't witnessed—she wasn't caught out.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: But if her husband becomes jealous and suspicious of his wife, whether she's guilty or not,
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: he is to take her before the priest. He is also to take with him on her behalf an offering of one tenth of an ephath of barley flour. He must also bring for her an offering of an ephath of barley flour. He's not to pour olive oil over it or put frankincense on it, since it's a grain offering for jealousy, a reminder offering to remind people about sin.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: The priest is to lead the wife forward and have her st and before the Lord.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Then he shall fill a clay jar with holy water in a clay jar and sprinkle on it some dust from the floor of the Tabernacle.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Once the priest has had the woman st and before the Lord, he shall let her hair loose and have her hold the reminder grain offering—the grain offering used in cases of jealousy. The priest shall hold the bitter water that curses.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: He shall place the woman under oath and tell her, ‘If no one else has slept with you and you have not been unfaithful and become unclean while married to your husband, may you not be harmed by this bitter water that curses.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: But if you have been unfaithful while married to your husband and have become unclean and have had sex with someone else…’
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: (Here the priest shall place the woman under the oath of the curse as follows.) {
May the Lord place a curse on you that everyone knows about by having your thighs shrink and your belly swell up.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: May this water that curses go into your stomach and make your belly swell up and your thighs shrink. The woman is to answer, ‘I agree, I agree.’
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: The priest is to write these curses on a scroll and then wash them off into the bitter water.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: He shall make the woman drink the bitter water that curses, and it will cause her bitter pain if she is guilty.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: The priest shall take back from her the grain offering for jealousy, wave it before the Lord, and take it to the altar.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Then the priest shall take a handful of the grain offering as a reminder portion and burn it on the altar, and make the woman drink the water.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: After he has made her drink the water, if she has made herself unclean and has been unfaithful to her husband, then the water that curses will cause her bitter pain. Her belly will swell up and her thighs will shrink. She will become a cursed woman among her people.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But if the woman has not made herself unclean by being unfaithful and is clean, she will not experience this punishment and she will still be able to have children.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: This is the rule to follow in cases of jealousy when a wife has an affair and makes herself unclean while married to her husband,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: or when a husband starts feeling jealous and becomes suspicious of his wife. He shall have his wife st and before the Lord, and the priest is to carry out every part of this rule.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: If she is found guilty,  her husband will not be held responsible. But the woman will bear the consequences of her sin.
segments.speaker: Unknown
